title: UserContextProfile
description: Seed profile contract for a Relevo user whose stored context can be bootstrapped locally or queried by request_context.

key.description: Stable seed handle used by context seed files. Runtime UUIDs are assigned by the database.

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown in bootstrap roster entries.

domain_summary.description: Brief ownership summary stored on app_user.domain_summary.

auth_token.description: Demo bearer token used by the local app to identify this user.

first_person.description: Whether generated answers may use first person when grounded in this user's stored context.

expertise_summary.description: One or two precise sentences used in bootstrap roster entries and on-demand context answering.

examples.domain_summary: Owns local assistant prompts, request-context tool contracts, and on-demand answer behavior.

voice.tone: Direct, pragmatic, and coordination-focused; challenges weak assumptions without derailing delivery.
signature_phrases: Let me ground this in the contract.
The useful question is what this changes downstream.

domain.expertise_summary: Owns the local assistant prompt, request-context tool contract, and on-demand context answer template.
